div.h1: Communication Overlap Timeline: Chunk-wise All-Reduce Pipelined with Computation

p.em: Technical Specification for Row-Parallel Linear Optimization (Distributed Training Framework)

g.text: Technical Specification: Parallelism-Aware Communication Protocols v4.2.0-LTS | Author: Architecture Lead

ul.li: Memory Pressure: Requires $2 \times$ pinned output memory for ping-pong buffering.
Optimal Chunking: $N=4$ or $N=8$ to minimize NCCL kernel launch overhead.
NVLink Saturation: Peak 600GB/s P2P required for efficient chunking below 1MB.
